ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Credit rating score of the customer */,
  "cards" INTEGER /* Number of credit cards held by the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level represented by years of education */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "student" TEXT /* Indicator if the customer is a student */,
  "married" TEXT /* Indicator if the customer is married */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the customer */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the customer's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the customer's employer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Checking, Savings) */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Closed) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for savings accounts */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for each account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdraw) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., admin, financial advisor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_management_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "affected_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)
